reasoning_content:
The user wants a JSON representation of the layout, including bounding boxes.

1.  **Identify the main sections:**
    *   Header: Document title, revision info, company logo.
    *   Section Title: "6.4 Thermal Information".
    *   Table: The core content, containing thermal metrics.
    *   Footnote: Reference to application report.
    *   Footer: Page number, feedback link, copyright, product links.

2.  **Extract Header:**
    *   "TPS562200, TPS563200": Top left.
    *   "SLVSCB0E – JANUARY 2014 – REVISED MAY 2023": Below title.
    *   "TEXAS INSTRUMENTS": Top right logo.
    *   "www.ti.com": Below logo.

3.  **Extract Section Title:**
    *   "6.4 Thermal Information": Bold header.

4.  **Extract Table:**
    *   The table has a complex header structure.
    *   Row 1: "THERMAL METRIC (1)", "TPS562200", "TPS563200", "UNITS".
    *   Row 2 (sub-header): "DDC (SOT)", "DDC (SOT)".
    *   Row 3 (sub-header): "(6 PINS)", "(6 PINS)".
    *   Data Rows:
        *   RθJA, Junction-to-ambient thermal resistance, 89.0, 87.9, °C/W (spans rows).
        *   RθJtop, Junction-to-case (top) thermal resistance, 44.5, 42.2.
        *   RθJB, Junction-to-board thermal resistance, 13.4, 13.6.
        *   ψJT, Junction-to-top characterization parameter, 2.2, 1.9.
        *   ψJB, Junction-to-board characterization parameter, 13.2, 13.3.

5.  **Extract Footnote:**
    *   "(1) For more information about traditional and new thermal metrics, see the IC Package Thermal Metrics application report, SPRA953."

6.  **Extract Footer:**
    *   "6": Page number.
    *   "Submit Document Feedback": Link.
    *   "Copyright © 2023 Texas Instruments Incorporated": Copyright.
    *   "Product Folder Links: TPS562200 TPS563200": Links.

7.  **Determine Bounding Boxes:**
    *   I will estimate coordinates based on the image size (approx 1000x1400).
    *   Header: y=50-80.
    *   Section Title: y=90-110.
    *   Table: y=115-260.
    *   Footnote: y=265-280.
    *   Footer: y=950-990.

8.  **Construct JSON:** Assemble the extracted text and coordinates into the final JSON structure.
